$comment: The UI boundary (ADR-APP-026). Project-owned: every project has different dependencies, so this file is never pinned and never delivered by governance:update. EVERY runtime dependency must appear in exactly one list, or `npm run lint` fails — that is what makes the rule a gate instead of a reminder.

notes.@fontsource/inter: A font: CSS + woff2. Puts no control on screen.
notes.@tauri-apps/api: The IPC boundary to the Rust backend. Renders nothing.
notes.@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog: Opens the native OS folder picker (a separate OS-drawn window, the explicit exception ADR-APP-026 §3 and ADR-PROJ-001 record) and listens for the webview's native drag-drop event. Puts nothing of its own in our DOM.
notes.lucide-react: Icon glyphs — SVG paths, no chrome, no behaviour, and they inherit the HUD's colour. An icon is not a control; the control around it is a HUD primitive.
notes._primitiveOnly_is_empty: This shell installs no UI library — every control is drawn from scratch in src/components/ui/. The day one is added it belongs here, and ESLint will then refuse to let a view import it.
